positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial creature, perhaps a hybrid owl or phoenix, perched on a crescent moon. The bird should be rendered in clean, bold, black linework with deep indigo and cosmic gold accents. Its silhouette must be dramatic and symmetrical, giving the feeling of gentle flight or solemn guardianship. The background should feature swirling nebula patterns, geometric constellations, and subtle stardust, all presented in a flat, graphic design style. Composition must be central and vertically balanced, suitable for a premium T-shirt print. Highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, high contrast, volumetric light, graphic novel style, perfect print quality.
